name: Crypto-Knowledge
description: The on-chain brain for AI agents: action 'ask' returns correct, live-verified Web3 knowledge in ONE call instead of burning search/reasoning credits. 160+ runbooks across Bitcoin, Ethereum & Solana — contract dev (Foundry invariants, v4 hooks, account abstraction, security patterns), DeFi (lending, vaults, yield, Pendle, Ethena), swaps & bridging (Uniswap v3/v4, aggregators, Across intents, CCTP), trading (arbitrage, MEV, perps) — plus multi-tool playbooks, 13 chain playbooks (Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Monad, Berachain, Sonic …), a keyless-API directory, canonical addresses and an error playbook.

inputs.description: POST this JSON body to the endpoint.

action.description: ask (RECOMMENDED) — send a natural-language question, get the best guides AND matching endpoints/addresses in ONE call; list_topics (free) lists all guides + reference tables; get_guide returns one runbook by id; search does deep full-text over guide bodies; reference returns a curated table.

topic.description: Guide id for get_guide, e.g. create_wallet, debug_failed_tx, x402_payments, register_onchain_tool.

data.description: guide (title, steps with real commands, warnings, references) or reference table entries

io.opensea.display.title: Crypto-Knowledge
io.opensea.display.subtitle: The on-chain brain for AI agents — runbooks, addresses, endpoints, error playbooks

pricing.description: Per-request fee: $0.01 USDC on Base via x402. Pay-per-call for everyone; listing topics is free. No NFT gate.
